MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs MARIANA STIRNER, BEONE MEDICINES USA, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Plaintiffs Mariana Cota Stirner and BeOne Medicines USA, Inc.'s unopposed Motion to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Erik W. Weibust may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Parties in this action.

A proposed order is submitted prior to the hearing. Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ABBVIE INC. MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Defendant AbbVie, Inc.'s unopposed Motion to Admit Counsel Matthew W. Walch Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, Counsel Matthew W. Walch may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
